const APIVersion = "2.0.0"
const BlockchainAlgorand Blockchain = "ALGORAND"
const BlockchainAvalanche Blockchain = "AVALANCHE"
const BlockchainBase Blockchain = "BASE"
const BlockchainBitcoin Blockchain = "BITCOIN"
const BlockchainBitcoincash Blockchain = "BITCOINCASH"
const BlockchainCardano Blockchain = "CARDANO"
const BlockchainCelestia Blockchain = "CELESTIA"
const BlockchainCelo Blockchain = "CELO"
const BlockchainCosmos Blockchain = "COSMOS"
const BlockchainDash Blockchain = "DASH"
const BlockchainDogecoin Blockchain = "DOGECOIN"
const BlockchainEos Blockchain = "EOS"
const BlockchainEthereum Blockchain = "ETHEREUM"
const BlockchainEthereumclassic Blockchain = "ETHEREUMCLASSIC"
const BlockchainEthereumpow Blockchain = "ETHEREUMPOW"
const BlockchainFantom Blockchain = "FANTOM"
const BlockchainFlare Blockchain = "FLARE"
const BlockchainHederahashgraph Blockchain = "HEDERAHASHGRAPH"
const BlockchainKava Blockchain = "KAVA"
const BlockchainKusama Blockchain = "KUSAMA"
const BlockchainLitecoin Blockchain = "LITECOIN"
const BlockchainNear Blockchain = "NEAR"
const BlockchainOptimism Blockchain = "OPTIMISM"
const BlockchainPolkadot Blockchain = "POLKADOT"
const BlockchainPolygon Blockchain = "POLYGON"
const BlockchainRipple Blockchain = "RIPPLE"
const BlockchainSmartchain Blockchain = "SMARTCHAIN"
const BlockchainSolana Blockchain = "SOLANA"
const BlockchainSongbird Blockchain = "SONGBIRD"
const BlockchainStellar Blockchain = "STELLAR"
const BlockchainTezos Blockchain = "TEZOS"
const BlockchainTron Blockchain = "TRON"
const ConfigPaymentMethodsItemApplePay ConfigPaymentMethodsItem = "apple-pay"
const ConfigPaymentMethodsItemCard ConfigPaymentMethodsItem = "card"
const ConfigPaymentMethodsItemGooglePay ConfigPaymentMethodsItem = "google-pay"
const ConfigPaymentMethodsItemRevolut ConfigPaymentMethodsItem = "revolut"
const EventTypeOrderCompleted EventType = "ORDER_COMPLETED"
const EventTypeOrderCreated EventType = "ORDER_CREATED"
const EventTypeOrderFailed EventType = "ORDER_FAILED"
const EventTypeOrderProcessing EventType = "ORDER_PROCESSING"
const OrderFailReasonCryptoWithdrawalFailed OrderFailReason = "CRYPTO_WITHDRAWAL_FAILED"
const OrderFailReasonOther OrderFailReason = "OTHER"
const OrderFailReasonPaymentDeclined OrderFailReason = "PAYMENT_DECLINED"
const OrderFailReasonPaymentNotReceived OrderFailReason = "PAYMENT_NOT_RECEIVED"
const OrderPaymentApplePay OrderPayment = "apple-pay"
const OrderPaymentCard OrderPayment = "card"
const OrderPaymentGooglePay OrderPayment = "google-pay"
const OrderPaymentRevolut OrderPayment = "revolut"
const OrderStatusAwaitingPayment OrderStatus = "AWAITING_PAYMENT"
const OrderStatusCompleted OrderStatus = "COMPLETED"
const OrderStatusFailed OrderStatus = "FAILED"
const OrderStatusProcessing OrderStatus = "PROCESSING"
const PartnersPaymentApplePay PartnersPayment = "apple-pay"
const PartnersPaymentCard PartnersPayment = "card"
const PartnersPaymentGooglePay PartnersPayment = "google-pay"
const PartnersPaymentRevolut PartnersPayment = "revolut"
func (*GetOrdersParams) ApplyDefaults
func (*Partners) GetOrder
func (*Partners) ListBuy
func (*Partners) ListConfig
func (*Partners) ListOrders
func (*Partners) ListOrdersAll
func (*Partners) ListQuote
func (*Webhooks) Create
func (*Webhooks) Delete
func (*Webhooks) Get
func (*Webhooks) List
func (*Webhooks) Update
func New
type BadRequestError struct { Message string `json:"message"` }
type Blockchain string
type Client struct { transport *transport.Transport Partners *Partners Webhooks *Webhooks }
type Config struct { Countries []CountryCode `json:"countries"` Crypto []*ConfigCryptoItem `json:"crypto"` FeePercentages []json.Number `json:"feePercentages,omitempty"` Fiat []*ConfigFiatItem `json:"fiat"` PaymentMethods []ConfigPaymentMethodsItem `json:"payment_methods"` Version string `json:"version"` }
type ConfigCryptoItem struct { Blockchain Blockchain `json:"blockchain"` Currency CurrencyCryptoCode `json:"currency"` ID string `json:"id"` SmartContractAddress string `json:"smartContractAddress,omitempty"` }
type ConfigFiatItem struct { Currency CurrencyFiat `json:"currency"` MaxLimit json.Number `json:"max_limit"` MinLimit json.Number `json:"min_limit"` }
type ConfigPaymentMethodsItem string
type CountryCode string
type Currency string
type CurrencyCryptoCode string
type CurrencyCryptoID string
type CurrencyFiat string
type DisabledByKillSwitchError struct { Message string `json:"message"` }
type EventType string
type GetBuyParams struct { Fiat Currency `json:"fiat"` Amount json.Number `json:"amount"` Crypto string `json:"crypto"` Payment PartnersPayment `json:"payment"` Region CountryCode `json:"region"` Wallet string `json:"wallet"` OrderID string `json:"orderId,omitempty"` FeePercentage json.Number `json:"feePercentage,omitempty"` PartnerRedirectURL string `json:"partnerRedirectUrl,omitempty"` AdditionalProperties string `json:"additionalProperties,omitempty"` }
type GetOrdersParams struct { Start time.Time `json:"start"` End time.Time `json:"end"` Skip int32 `json:"skip,omitempty"` Limit int32 `json:"limit,omitempty"` }
type GetOrdersParams2 struct { Wallet string `json:"wallet"` }
type GetQuoteParams struct { Fiat Currency `json:"fiat"` Amount json.Number `json:"amount"` Crypto string `json:"crypto"` Payment PartnersPayment `json:"payment"` Region CountryCode `json:"region"` FeePercentage json.Number `json:"feePercentage,omitempty"` WalletAddress string `json:"walletAddress,omitempty"` }
type MoneyCryptoID struct { Amount json.Number `json:"amount"` CurrencyID CurrencyCryptoID `json:"currencyId"` }
type MoneyFiat struct { Amount json.Number `json:"amount"` Currency CurrencyFiat `json:"currency"` }
type NotFoundError struct { Message string `json:"message"` }
type Order struct { AdditionalProperties map[string]string `json:"additionalProperties,omitempty"` CreatedAt time.Time `json:"created_at"` Crypto MoneyCryptoID `json:"crypto"` ExchangeRate json.Number `json:"exchange_rate"` FailReason OrderFailReason `json:"fail_reason,omitempty"` Fees *OrderFees `json:"fees"` FeesPartnerCurrency *OrderFeesPartnerCurrency `json:"fees_partner_currency"` Fiat MoneyFiat `json:"fiat"` ID string `json:"id"` Payment OrderPayment `json:"payment"` Status OrderStatus `json:"status"` TransactionHash string `json:"transaction_hash,omitempty"` UpdatedAt time.Time `json:"updated_at"` Wallet string `json:"wallet"` }
type OrderFailReason string
type OrderFees struct { NetworkFee MoneyFiat `json:"network_fee"` PartnerFee MoneyFiat `json:"partner_fee"` RampFee MoneyFiat `json:"ramp_fee"` }
type OrderFeesPartnerCurrency struct { NetworkFee MoneyFiat `json:"network_fee"` PartnerFee MoneyFiat `json:"partner_fee"` RampFee MoneyFiat `json:"ramp_fee"` }
type OrderPayment string
type OrderStatus string
type Partners struct { t *transport.Transport }
type PartnersPayment string
type Quote struct { Crypto MoneyCryptoID `json:"crypto"` NetworkFee MoneyFiat `json:"network_fee"` PartnerFee MoneyFiat `json:"partner_fee"` ServiceFee MoneyFiat `json:"service_fee"` }
type RampRedirectURL struct { RampRedirectURL string `json:"ramp_redirect_url"` }
type UnexpectedError struct { ErrorID string `json:"errorId"` Timestamp int64 `json:"timestamp"` }
type Webhook struct { Events []EventType `json:"events"` ID string `json:"id"` SigningSecret string `json:"signing_secret"` URL string `json:"url"` }
type WebhookCreateRequest struct { Events []EventType `json:"events"` URL string `json:"url"` }
type WebhookUpdateRequest struct { Events []EventType `json:"events,omitempty"` URL string `json:"url,omitempty"` }
type Webhooks struct { t *transport.Transport }
var SandboxHostAliases = map[string]string{}
